The '''''Ardent''''' was a [[MC40a light cruiser/Legends|MC40a light cruiser]] in service to the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

==History==
[[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Naval Forces]], led by [[Implacable (EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate)|Frigate ''Implacable'']], lured the ''Ardent'' into an ambush following the destruction of a Rebel [[AZ 77|Platform]] and supply depot; the cruiser ''Ardent'' was subsequently destroyed.

{{Ship-stub}}

*[[Star Wars: TIE Fighter (video game)|''Star Wars: TIE Fighter'']]
